<!-- Generated with https://github.com/reakaleek/gh-action-readme -->

# <!--name-->Generate git-cliff Release Notes<!--/name-->

<!--description-->
Generate release notes with a configurable command and fallback text.
<!--/description-->

## Inputs

<!--inputs-->
| Name                | Description                                                    | Required | Default                                                                        |
|---------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `output-path`       | Release notes output path.                                     | `false`  | `temp/release-notes.md`                                                        |
| `command`           | Shell command that writes release notes to RELEASE_NOTES_PATH. | `false`  | `npm run --silent changelog:release-notes -- --output "${RELEASE_NOTES_PATH}"` |
| `fallback-text`     | Text written when the command creates an empty file.           | `false`  | `No release notes were generated by git-cliff.`                                |
| `working-directory` | Directory where the release notes command runs.                | `false`  | `.`                                                                            |
<!--/inputs-->

## Outputs

<!--outputs-->
| Name   | Description         |
|--------|---------------------|
| `path` | Release notes path. |
<!--/outputs-->

## Usage

<!--usage action="Nick2bad4u/workflow-templates/.github/actions/generate-git-cliff-release-notes" version="main"-->

```yaml
steps:
 - name: "Generate release notes from git-cliff"
   id: "release_notes"
   uses: "Nick2bad4u/workflow-templates/.github/actions/generate-git-cliff-release-notes@main"
   with:
    output-path: "temp/release-notes.md"
```

<!--/usage-->
